artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2025-01-21
artifacts.excerpt: @SchrodingrsBrat Buddy of mine in college used to start his homework right after taking an edible. You had about an hour to finish or else it’s too late. Called it “racing an edible”.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2024-11-11
artifacts.excerpt:
@Locati0ns @waitbutwhy It’s interesting to see a map like this. This is what most European states looked like prior to their unification(looking at you, Holy Roman Empire).

Possibly the mistake with colonialism was not that ethnically diverse groups were unified. It was that they were forced early.

planets.name: Don

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-09-27
artifacts.excerpt: @bernoussama @DanielLockyer @hard_simp The AI as a tie breaker comes back to the fundamental problem. How can we trust the tie breaker? Who is to say the tie breaker is more correct than the agents? If it’s smarter and more aligned than the agents, why don’t we just ditch the agents and have only the tie breakers?
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, say, use, something.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2025-01-06
artifacts.excerpt:
One aspect of Elons approach I don’t see mentioned often is how his businesses strengthen each other.
Benefits:
1. Diversification / ability to take advantage of asymmetric opportunities.
2. Well funded: cash cows can fund moonshots.
3. Tech and knowledge sharing.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, say, use, something.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-11-04
artifacts.excerpt: @hubermanlab Makes you realize that MSM is telling on itself a bit when they accuse new media of giving platform to radicals. They see their role in society as one that actively promotes or challenges things. IOW they don’t see themselves as neutral.

planets.name: Think
planets.summary: Archive cluster around think: 17 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2024-12-05
artifacts.excerpt:
X is a great platform not in spite of, but *because* of all the misinformation.

Seeing the slop helps me to think more critically. Many people are stupid, dishonest, or both. Seeing blatant lies puts me in a questioning state of mind which helps me detect the subtle lies.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: think, only, now, most.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2024-12-01
artifacts.excerpt: @SpiritofPines Man yall are really fired up over this. Ever think maybe this is only half the story?
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: think, only, now, most.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2025-01-20
artifacts.excerpt:
I have *many* copes about AI, this is one.

We are all worried about what jobs AI will automate next, but we never stop to think  “what can we already automate but are not?”.

For some reason humans like employing other humans. Sometimes to our detriment. https://t.co/IO3XftB92I
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: think, only, now, most.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2024-10-07
artifacts.excerpt:
What if the reason we exist is “because it’s cool”? 

Most of the people working to create AGI are doing it because they think it’s cool.

What if the meaning of life is just maximizing complexity(coolness)?
